text:
USgymnast Simone Biles has called on reporters to allow athletes to ‘soak up the moment’ rather than asking ‘what’s next’ after they win medals at theOlympics.

Biles has been one of the stars of this summer’s Games, with the 27-year-old clinching her third gold in Paris as she took the vault title in emphatic fashion on Saturday.

The stunning victory came after Biles helped the United States to women’s team gold and the all-around title, three years on fromthe dreaded‘twisties’ the American suffered in Tokyo which forced her to withdraw from several events.

On Monday, Biles – the most decorated US gymnast in history – will return to the Bercy Arena for the women’s balance beam final followed by the women’s floor exercise final, where she will be targeting yet more glory.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris Olympics 2024

Over the course of the last week,Biles’ war of words with former team-mate MyKayla Skinner has hit the headlinesand the Ohio-born legend has alsobeen forced to defend her husband after he was pictured wearing one of her medals.

And this morning, an agitated Biles took to X, formerly Twitter, to blast journalists and broadcasters for repeatedly asking her and her fellow competitors exactly the same question when they win medals.

‘You guys really gotta stop asking athletes what’s next after they win a medal at the Olympics,’ Biles wrote.

you guys really gotta stop asking athletes whatâs next after they win a medal at the Olympics

‘Let us soak up the moment we’ve worked our whole lives for.’

‘What is your next step after winning Gold medal??’, one of Biles’ followers jokingly asked, to which she replied: ‘Babysitting the medal’.

It remains to be seen whether or not Biles will commit four more years to the sport to compete at the 2028 Summer Olympics, taking place in her native United States.

‘Never say never,’ Biles begrudgingly told reporters in the wake of her latest gold medal success.

‘Next Olympics are at home. So you just never know.

‘I am getting really old.’

title: 'Gotta stop' - Simone Biles fumes over Olympic athletes being asked same question | Metro News
description: US star Simone Biles has told reporters to let athletes 'soak up the moment' rather than asking 'what's next' after they win Olympic medals.
